idea-plugin.name: Commit Generator
idea-plugin.description:
Generate conventional git commit messages instantly using AI — supports both Gemini (cloud) and Ollama (local, private).

Features:
  • Reads your staged diff and produces a single-line type(scope): description commit message
  • Gemini: gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-1.5-flash, gemini-1.5-pro
  • Ollama: any locally running model (llama3, mistral, codellama, etc.)
  • API key stored securely in the system credential store — never written to disk in plain text
  • One-click copy to clipboard
Usage: Stage your files, open the Commit Generator tool window, and click Generate.
Configure your provider and credentials in Settings → Tools → Commit Generator.
